name: Pecan Surprise
recipeIngredient: 2 sm pkg French Vanilla Instant Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter.
2. Mix the flour and pecans with the melted butter until combined.
3. Press the mixture firmly into a 9 x 13-inch baking dish.
4. Bake at 375 degrees for 15 minutes, then let cool completely.
5. Beat together the cream cheese, powdered sugar, and first Cool Whip until smooth.
6. Pour over the cooled crust.
7. Mix the instant pudding according to package instructions, reducing milk to 3 cups instead of 4.
8. Pour over the cream cheese mixture.
9. Cover with the second layer of Cool Whip.
10. Garnish with pecan chips.
